nodes.title: Load Employees And Stations
nodes.description: On page load, call Promise.all([api.getEmployees(bizId), api.getStations(bizId)]). Success: populate employees and stations signals. Failure: show error toast and keep loading false.

nodes.title: Compute Employees Summary
nodes.description: After loading employees, derive filtered employee view and totalSalaries from filteredEmployees() based on current filterStation signal.

nodes.title: Set Station Filter
nodes.description: When user clicks filter tabs (الكل/الإدارة/محطة), update filterStation signal. filteredEmployees() recalculates reactively by station id or admin fallback for empty station value.

nodes.title: Open Employee Form
nodes.description: When user clicks add/edit, open modal and populate form with defaults or selected employee. In edit mode set editingId before save.

nodes.title: Save Employee
nodes.description: On save, call api.updateEmployee(id, data) for edit mode or api.createEmployee(bizId, data) for add mode (salary serialized as string). Success: close modal, show success toast, and reload employees/stations. Failure: show backend error toast.

nodes.title: Open Employee Delete Confirmation
nodes.description: When user clicks delete, call toast.confirm with warning text. Cancel keeps page unchanged. Confirm continues with delete API.

nodes.title: Delete Employee
nodes.description: After confirmation, call DELETE /api/employees/:id. Success: show success toast and reload list. Failure: show error toast.
